title: MeterValuesEvent
description: Periodic or on-demand meter readings reported by a station during an active session.

seqNo.description: Optional per-session monotonic counter starting at 0, incrementing by 1 for each session-scoped EVENT (MeterValues, SessionEnded). See spec/02-transport.md §3.2 for ordering rules and spec/05-state-machines.md §2.5 for NVS persistence requirements.
